programs.title: Peppa Pig
programs.sub_title: Not Very Well; Lunch; Mummy Pig at Work; Gardening; School Play
programs.desc: Peppa does not feel well; Peppa visits Granny and Grandpa Pig; Mummy Pig works on her computer; Peppa and George help Grandpa in the garden; Peppa's play group puts on a play.

programs.title: PAW Patrol
programs.sub_title: Pups Save a Chicken Tulip; Pups Stop an Xtreme Shark
programs.desc: When Mayor Humdinger and his mother help Mayor Goodway look for a rare tulip, Humdinger gets them all in trouble; the pups must save Daring Danny X when a mechanical shark stunt goes awry.

programs.title: Rubble & Crew
programs.sub_title: The Crew Builds a Houseboat; The Crew Builds a Spa
programs.desc: Rubble moves with his family of construction pups to the nearby town of Builder Cove where they live, play, and build whatever the community needs.

programs.title: Mr. Crocodile
programs.desc: Mr. Crocodile and his best friend Daisy cheerfully navigate life with boundless enthusiasm and comical misunderstandings due to his instinctive crocodile logic.

programs.title: PAW Patrol
programs.sub_title: Sea Patrol: Pups Save a Water Walker; Sea Patrol: Pups Save a Windsurfer
programs.desc: Mayor Humdinger swipes Francois' water-walking shoes and ends up trapped in a pit-like turtle nest; the pups spring into action when a nearby volcano erupts.

programs.title: PAW Patrol
programs.sub_title: Cat Pack/PAW Patrol Rescue: Rocket Rescuers; Cat Pack/PAW Patrol Rescue: The Golden Lion Mask
programs.desc: Cat-Pack members Wild and Shade team up with the Mighty Pups to stop a runaway rocket; when the Ruff-Ruff Pack swipes a priceless golden lion mask from the museum, Shade and Wild must help the PAW Patrol to retrieve the stolen artifact.
